title: Don’t Fight the Stock Market—Make It Work for You | Dimensional
gist: A promotional Informed Investor podcast teaser (Episode 51) for David Booth's forthcoming book Stay Calm (out Sept 1, 2026), framing investing as decision-making under uncertainty and urging investors to treat uncertainty as opportunity rather than something to fight.

insights.claim: David Booth frames investing as fundamentally the practice of making decisions under uncertainty, rather than trying to forecast where the stock market is headed.
insights.speaker: Featuring David Booth, Founder and Chairman
insights.so_what: Reinforces the passive/factor-investing case against market timing; relevant to anyone weighing tactical allocation versus staying invested.
insights.quote: investing is about making decisions under uncertainty

insights.claim: Booth argues investors should embrace uncertainty as a source of opportunity instead of worrying about market direction.
insights.speaker: Featuring David Booth, Founder and Chairman
insights.so_what: Behavioral framing that supports staying invested through volatility; a discipline cue for long-horizon equity holders.
insights.quote: He encourages investors to embrace uncertainty as a source of opportunity.

insights.claim: David Booth's new book Stay Calm will be available September 1, 2026, with details at staycalminvesting.com.
insights.speaker: Jake DeKinder, Head of Client Communications
insights.so_what: A dated content/marketing catalyst signaling Dimensional's continued thought-leadership push around behavioral, stay-the-course investing.
insights.quote: Stay Calm will be available September 1, 2026.

source_meta.author: Featuring David Booth, Founder and Chairman
